meta.title: Philosophy — TendFarm
meta.description: Learn how TendFarm turns your Activity, sleep, HRV, and daily rhythm into farm growth speed and harvest.

hero.title: Your Healthy Life, Manifested as a Farm
hero.subtitle: TendFarm is a healthy-life manifestation farm: it turns your Activity, sleep, HRV, and long-term daily rhythm into farm growth speed, harvest abundance, fuel efficiency, and level progression.

principles.title: Health data doesn't give coins directly
principles.desc: Activity affects growth speed, sleep affects harvest abundance, HRV affects fuel efficiency. Health data influences output through efficiency, not direct exchange.

principles.title: Casual users need no planning
principles.desc: The system auto-configures default crops. Power users can enter the field-planning screen to optimize output around their own rhythm.

principles.title: Daily rhythm is your conversion rate
principles.desc: Life rhythm is the efficiency multiplier that converts health data into farm effects — up to 12% boost. It's not decoration; it's productivity.

principles.title: Automation means offline management
principles.desc: Your farm keeps running even when the app is closed. When automation fails, players can step in manually to cover the gap.

rows.output: Crops in active time slots ripen early

meta.title: Healthy Living — TendFarm
meta.description: Learn how circadian rhythm, HRV, sleep quality, and regular activity affect your body and your TendFarm.

sections.title: What Is Circadian Rhythm?
sections.body: Circadian rhythm is your body's built-in 24-hour biological clock, regulating sleep, hormone secretion, body temperature, and metabolic pace. A regular schedule — consistent wake times, meal times, and exercise windows — keeps this clock on time, delivering better sleep quality, more stable energy, and faster physical recovery. In TendFarm, your daily rhythm directly determines how efficiently health data converts into farm effects: the more consistent your rhythm, the more farm value every step, sleep session, and HRV reading generates.

sections.title: What Is HRV and Why Does It Matter?
sections.body: HRV (Heart Rate Variability) measures the variation in time between consecutive heartbeats. Higher HRV generally indicates a more adaptable autonomic nervous system, stronger recovery capacity, and better stress resilience. HRV is influenced by sleep quality, exercise intensity, alcohol, stress, and schedule regularity. Apple Watch calculates HRV using resting heart rate and overnight sleep data. In TendFarm, HRV affects the fuel efficiency of the auto-harvester — the higher your HRV, the less fuel harvesting consumes.

sections.title: How Sleep Quality Affects Your Day
sections.body: Sleep consists of three stages: light sleep, deep sleep, and REM. Deep sleep handles physical repair; REM handles memory consolidation and emotional regulation. Adults need 7–9 hours of sleep per night, with deep sleep comprising 15–25%. A consistent bedtime and wake time is the single most effective way to improve sleep quality. In TendFarm, the previous night's sleep quality condenses into 'Morning Dew' that makes the day's harvest more abundant — the better you sleep, the fuller the next day's yield.

sections.title: How to Build a Stable Activity Rhythm
sections.body: Research shows that walking 7,000–10,000 steps per day is associated with significantly reduced all-cause mortality. More important than step count is regularity: being active at the same time each day reinforces your circadian clock, improving sleep quality and daytime energy. High-intensity exercise isn't required — walking, cycling, and stair-climbing all count. In TendFarm, whatever time slot you're active in, crops in that slot grow faster — your morning run helps morning crops ripen early.

sections.title: How to Read Your Apple Watch Health Data
sections.body: Apple Watch's Fitness app summarizes daily steps, active calories, workout minutes, and stand hours; the Health app shows sleep analysis, heart rate trends, and HRV. Key metrics: resting heart rate (lower is better, typically 50–70 bpm), HRV (higher is better, varies by individual), deep sleep percentage (aim for 15%+), and active calories (aim to close your daily rings). TendFarm reads these automatically — no manual input required.
